description_long: This is a vintage-style lantern with a weathered, blue-gray metallic frame and a prominent central glass enclosure. The lantern features a rounded top cap with a small loop for hanging, and two sturdy side arms that curve down to a wide, circular base. The glass enclosure is bulbous and frosted, protected by a wire guard that wraps around its midsection and is anchored to the frame. Rust and patina are visible throughout the metal surfaces, giving the lantern an aged, utilitarian appearance. The design suggests it is an oil lamp, with a knob and possible fill cap visible near the base, and the overall construction is robust and functional, suitable for outdoor or urban use.
description: A weathered, blue-gray metal lantern with a frosted glass enclosure and protective wire guard, showing signs of rust and age. Its robust, vintage design suggests it is an oil lamp suitable for outdoor or urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full glass enclosure, wire guard, and both side arms, with the knob and fill cap visible at the base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the lantern, the curvature of the side arms, and the profile of the wire guard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the glass enclosure and the symmetrical structure of the frame and arms.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the side profile and the attachment points of the wire guard.
